mission.heading: Our
paragraphs: At Re:Life, we believe in the transformative power of technology to address pressing mental health challenges. Our mission is to make comprehensive mental health support and wellness resources accessible to everyone, everywhere.
Founded by Avrina Lanka, Re:Life combines cutting-edge technology with compassionate care to create a platform that truly understands and supports your mental health journey.

values.title: Compassion
values.description: We approach every interaction with empathy and understanding

values.title: Excellence
values.description: We strive for the highest standards in everything we do

values.title: Community
values.description: We believe in the power of connection and shared experiences

values.title: Innovation
values.description: We continuously innovate to improve mental health care

team.name: Avrina Lanka
team.bio: Mental health advocate with 10+ years of experience in healthcare technology

team.name: Dr. Sarah Johnson
team.bio: Licensed psychiatrist specializing in digital mental health solutions

team.bio: Tech innovator passionate about accessible healthcare technology
